_comment: Copy to config/linkedin-watchlist.json and replace with the creators YOU admire. Agent 2 mines these profiles for outlier posts (engagement vs the author's own average) and saves the STRUCTURE of winners — hook shape, line rhythm, visual format — for the writer to pattern-match. Never lift phrasing. 'slug' = the linkedin.com/in/<slug> part of the public URL (or /company/<slug> with type: 'company'). 'host' = your RapidAPI LinkedIn-scraper provider host — pick any provider you subscribe to; if one shuts down, swapping this one line is the whole fix. 'lane' is a free-form label for which content pillar this creator maps to.

profiles.name: Example Creator
profiles.note: The category benchmark in your niche — study their hooks, never their words

profiles.name: Example Adjacent Voice
profiles.note: VERIFY SLUG — common name, multiple profiles

profiles.name: Example Company
profiles.note: Company pages need type: 'company'; watch what they amplify, not just what they post
